title: ericameria juarezensis
intro: Ericameria juarezensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ericameria juarezensis are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of tea or tincture, are used to support skin health and immune function.
